reviews.review_msg: Ilia really is a good prof, he is heavy on class activities but also provides valuable insights for your work. The key is to use the feedback and use it in your work. He's happy to answer all the questions, but it's not a regular class, it's heavily based on your actually learning rather than the tests, which is I suppose gonna help irl?!

Ilia is the best professor ever! His teaching style promotes interesting academic advancement, and by blending business theory with current events, he brings the subject matter to life, making every lesson a unique and practical learning experience. Ilia also provides useful feedback, pointing out areas where a student could make improvements.
Not recommended overall; teach nothing in the class but test the textbook in the midterm.
If you don't teach anything in class, the students don't know where the points are deducted. He's not fit to teach. Choose another professor rather than him....
Do not take this course with him!!!!!!!! He is so terrible. He doesn't teach anything in class and he is very intimidating.
She has her own criterion and won't explain that to you. It means you never know how you fail this course. Probably the worst teacher Ive ever met. Though she is a nice person.

Very helpful especially during office hours. Gives very good feedback. need to be a good presenter and study hard. Hardly teaches anything in class. Will make you do a lot of team work and project, email assignment. She will make you work for the marks. Tough grader indeed. Get ready to study on your own. Got a B though had to work for it.

She is approchable. Tough grader indeed. Please be prepared to read on your own if you take her course. As she will make you do a lot of group work . emails etc. please be good in presentation. and participation and attendence matters!
He  is very humorous
Hey, at least he is fair. I dont know why he has this low of a rating, at least he doesnt go around accusing people of cheating like Layla Cameron. Solid prof overall, you just need to study!

When I read the reviews before taking the prof I was scared cause everyone said he was really horrible but when I took the class, he's not bad at all. he's funny at points, he makes dad jokes haha but of you just stick to what he asks of you then you are good to go. follow his instructions and you will get a good grade. just a bit grumpy

DO NOT TAKE THIS CLASS!!!!!!!!!! Worst prof i've ever taken, has a huge ego but not confident and can barely maintain any eye contact. avoids accountability on EVERYTHINGGG. He forces you to buy the book first class and never used it once. He tends to ramble alot but there is no content to his yapping so its just 4 hours of ur day wasted. 0/10 prof
His classes reminded me of life in prison

Follow instructions, Do as he says, and you will be fine. He is scary yes, but tbh I think it is all part of a persona he likes to play during class to frighten students. Don't try to play dumb on him, he is NOT scared of giving zeros. 

Fun fact: he is a Taylor swift and hello kitty fan (pay attention to lectures and you'll notice lol)

Honestly, I can tell you that it's pretty rough with this professor. He's just mean and doesn't explain the assignments or content well at all. his explanations can be super confusing

I wouldn't say I hate the guy, but he's just not a great teacher. If you take this course with him be ready to fail. I recommend looking for another professor.
worst teacher in FIC.. i suggest dropping his course.

If you are an incoming fic stuents, wanting to take 216 DO NOT take this prof. He will make sure your life in this course misrable with his stuttering speech, and very tough grading in the presentation
She didnt explain properly the specific requirements for the course's projects and exam and when you ask for it, she just ignore the question, which is very bad. Not recommend:(((

You have to get her to like you otherwise it will be bad. She expects professionalism at all time which is confusing. You cant choose your group and its as *diverse as possible* and at the end some team members do nothing and that affects you but she does not understand it. You have to complete team documents every week.
Best professor you should choose without doubt at FIC! Perfect!
This professor doesn't give fair grades he thinks nobody can do better only he knows everything. Doesn't give good grades to deservings. Always says you did bad in everything
He's a complete disaster, rubbish, don't ever take his class or otherwise u gonna suck on ur own. He does not give marks and say at the end u did disaster
